a: An app extension you extend to participate in data export and import.
Perform a one-time transfer of your app’s on-device data to or from a device running another platform.

The migration completed successfully.
A type that indicates the options supported by the destination device.
An object your app uses to archive resources during an export operation.

A protocol for exporting transportable resources in an archive format.

A protocol for exporting transportable resources in a streaming archive format.
A collection of all values of this type.

The application support directory within the container.

The bundle identifier of the app within the store.
Sets the import status to a nil value to prevent further notification.
The number of compressed bytes written to the migration infrastructure, if the extension uses compression.

The documents directory within the app container.

Tells the migration extension to begin exporting its resources.
